🚨 FORCE CLEAR CACHE

Clear ALL cached files and see the new Amazon-style design immediately!

⚠️ This Will:

  1. Delete all service worker caches
  2. Clear localStorage and sessionStorage
  3. Force reload every single file
  4. Unregister old service workers

📋 What to Do After Clearing Cache:

1
Click "FORCE CLEAR EVERYTHING" above and wait for success message
2
Close ALL browser windows completely (make sure no browser processes running)
3
Open browser fresh and navigate to http://localhost:3000
4
Press Ctrl+Shift+R ONCE to ensure completely fresh load
5
Enjoy your new Amazon-style design! 🎉

✅ You'll Know It Worked When:

✓ Wishlist shows horizontal Amazon-style cards
✓ Cards are compact (~200px, not ~400px)
✓ Amazon orange/yellow buttons
✓ Clean, professional modern design
